localized_texts.text: Big Bus Singapore

Hop on our Big Bus Tour to discover the sights, landmarks and attractions that define Singapore. There are 2 different Singapore tour routes to choose from, the City Tour (Yellow Line) and the Heritage Tour (Red Line).Experience the sights and sounds of Singapore at your leisure. With over 40 stops to hop on and off from, we have got all the best bits of Singapore covered. Tune in to pre-recorded audio commentary, available in 7 languages.The Yellow line will take you to the prominent sights of Singapore Flyer, Marina Bay Sands, Gardens by the Bay, Merlion, Singapore Botanic Gardens, and Raffles Hotel. The Red line tovarious ethnic neighborhoods -Little India, Kampong Glam, and Chinatown featuring pre-World War II restored shophouses, Buddhist and Hindu temples.
Uninterrupted Views: You can get uninterrupted views of iconic landmarks.
Audio Guide: The tour provides an engaging audio commentary in 7 languages.
Flexible Timing: Buses run every 15-25 minutes, providing you with the flexibility to explore Singapore at your own pace.

Your ticket gives you access to 2 hop-on hop-off sightseeing routes and it is not only the most comprehensive hop-on touring system in Singapore, but also a transport network that links you from hotels to key landmarks and attractions.Hop on to discover and Hop-off to explore the Lion City. For cultural discoveries, visit the 3 ethnic districts of Singapore – Chinatown, Little India and Kampong Glam – where you’ll find pre-World War II conserved shophouses, Buddhist and Hindu temples, and traditional trades and handicrafts. Don’t forget to check out the UNESCO world heritage site Botanic Gardens, glamourous and glitzy locations where hit movie Crazy Rich Asian was filmed, like Marina Bay Sands and Gardens by the Bay.Choose a 1 day Discover Ticket and hop off at any stop to explore Singapore your way. Pick a 2 day Essential Ticket for another day on the bus. Or go for a 2 day Explore Ticket that comes with a 3 hours guided Night City Tour.The Night City Tour is a 3 hours fully guided open-top, double-decker bus tour whereby you will be awed by the breathtaking view of the city skyline at Marina Barrage. Sampling of local food at Lau Pa Sat and catch the Garden Rhapsody light and sound show at the Supertree Grove, an impressive set of vertical gardens that light up in a dazzling display.
Accessibility: Wheelchair accessible on lower deck of the 2 Hop-on Hop-off routes
Restriction: During road closures, some bus stops may be skipped; in the event that this occurs, notices will be posted at counters and on buses
What’s included: 1 Day Hop on, Hop off Ticket
What’s included: Unlimited access to 2 routes covering key landmarks and attractions
What’s included: Pre-recorded Commentary available in 12 languages
What’s included: Complimentary earphones for audio commentary
What’s included: See all top landmarks
What’s included: Buses run every 25 to 40minsm depending on route
What’s included: Real-time bus tacking and detailed map route overview
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter
How to use: Please redeem your vouchers at BIG BUS & DUCK Tourist Counter Hub at Suntec City Tower 2, 3 Temasek Boulevard, #01-K8, Singapore 038983

Terms & Conditions: Admission Ticket is not valid for special themed tours. Ticket is non-refundable.Eligibility Adult ticket applies to ages 13 years old and above. Child ticket applies to ages 2 to 12 years old.Attraction Access Wheelchair access is available on the lower deck of 2 Open Top Bus routes. Pre-recorded commentary is available in 7 languages: English, Mandarin, Korean, Japanese, German, French, and Italian. Complimentary earphones are provided for audio commentary. See all top landmarks Redemption Procedure: Yellow Line: 9:30 AM – 5:15 PM (every 25–40 minutes). Red Line: 9:40 AM – 5:05 PM (every 25–40 minutes). During road closures, some bus stops may be skipped. Notices will be posted at counters and on buses.Additional Information Please refer to the venue’s official website for more information about PWD accessibility. The tour operates rain or shine. In case of rain, please bring an umbrella, raincoat, or poncho.Important Notes Please check schedules and notices on-site as routes may change due to road conditions or closures.
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
What’s included: Transport by fun open top, double-decker bus
What’s included: Satay sampling at Lau Pa Sat
What’s included: Complimentary 1-way transfer from 33 bus stops to BIG BUS & DUCK Tourist Hub where the tour begins
What’s included: Professional English speaking guide
What’s included: 3-hour fully guided tour

Terms & Conditions: Admission Ticket is valid only on the selected visit date. Tours depart daily at 6:15 PM. Please check in 30 minutes before the tour time. Night tour duration is approximately 3–3.5 hours.Eligibility Adult ticket applies to ages 13 years old and above. Child ticket applies to ages 2 to 12 years old.Attraction Access Wheelchair access is available on the lower deck. No pets are allowed on board, except service animals. Food and alcohol are not permitted on board. Non-alcoholic drinks in screw-top bottles are allowed.Additional Information Please refer to the venue’s official website for more information about PWD accessibility. The tour operates rain or shine. Please bring an umbrella, raincoat, or poncho if it rains.Important Notes Traffic congestion may occur, and tours may be delayed. We appreciate your understanding and patience.
What’s included: 2 – Day hop-on, hop-off ticket
What’s included: Pre-recorded commentary available in 12 languages
What’s included: Buses run every 25 to 40 mins, depending on route
What’s included: Real-time bus tracking and detailed map stop-by-stop route overview
What’s included: 3 hours Fully Guided Night City Tour
